text:
{"type":"DRAG_FILL","title":"Fill in the Blanks: Function Syntax Challenge","lessonText":"In this challenge, you will practice defining functions in Python. Functions are essential building blocks in programming, allowing you to encapsulate code for reuse. Pay attention to the syntax and the use of parameters.","data":{"challenges":[{"instruction":"Fill in the blanks to define a function in Python. Use the clues from the Functions Overview and Flashcards.","codeTemplate":"___ function_name(___):
    print('Hello, World!')","options":["def","return","parameters","args"],"correctAnswer":"def, parameters","explanation":"In Python, to define a function, you start with 'def' followed by the function name and parentheses for parameters."},{"instruction":"Complete the function definition using the correct syntax. Refer to the Understanding Functions in Python.","codeTemplate":"def ___():
    pass","options":["my_function","function_name","new_function","test_function"],"correctAnswer":"my_function","explanation":"The function name must be a valid identifier, and 'my_function' is an example of a proper function name."},{"instruction":"Identify the missing keyword to create a function that returns a value. Use the hints from the Functions Overview.","codeTemplate":"def my_function(___):
    return ___","options":["return","value","args","result"],"correctAnswer":"args, result","explanation":"To return a value from a function, you need to use the 'return' keyword followed by the value you want to return."},{"instruction":"Fill in the blanks to create a function that takes two parameters and prints their sum.","codeTemplate":"def ___(a, b):
    print(a + b)","options":["sum_function","add_numbers","calculate_sum","total"],"correctAnswer":"add_numbers","explanation":"The function name should reflect its purpose, and 'add_numbers' is descriptive for a function that sums two values."}],"references":[{"title":"Python Official Tutorial","url":"https://docs.python.org/3/tutorial/","kind":"web"},{"title":"Python Standard Library","url":"https://docs.python.org/3/library/","kind":"web"},{"title":"Wikipedia Topic Overview","url":"https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:Search?search=Python%20for%20Beginners%3A%20A%20Youth-Focused%20Journey%20to%20Mastery%20Functions%3A%20The%20Building%20Blocks%20of%20Python%20Programming%20Fill%20in%20the%20Blanks%3A%20Function%20Syntax%20Challenge","kind":"web"},{"title":"Google Scholar Search","url":"https://scholar.google.com/scholar?q=Python%20for%20Beginners%3A%20A%20Youth-Focused%20Journey%20to%20Mastery%20Functions%3A%20The%20Building%20Blocks%20of%20Python%20Programming%20Fill%20in%20the%20Blanks%3A%20Function%20Syntax%20Challenge","kind":"web"}]}}
